title: Joliday Jalapeño
description: A playful jalapeño-inspired ornament, perfect for adding a spicy touch of whimsy to any festive display or gift box.

title: Texas Trinket Tray
description: A charming ceramic tray inspired by the wide-open skies of Texas, ideal for jewelry, keys, or tiny keepsakes.

title: Salt Seller
description: A minimalist salt cellar with a gentle curve, designed to keep your favorite finishing salt at arm’s reach on the table.

title: Disco Ball Tray
description: A glossy tray with a disco ball shimmer, perfect for candles, jewelry, or as a sparkling centerpiece.

title: Santorini Earrings
description: Lightweight earrings inspired by Santorini’s blue domes and whitewashed walls, ideal for everyday or special occasions.

title: Cowboy Boot Tray
description: A petite tray shaped like a cowboy boot, made for rings, coins, or tiny treasures with a dash of western charm.
